name: Fire Hose Ramp
shortDescription: Rubber ramp protecting a firefighting hose where it crosses a road or vehicle path.
longDescription: When a fire hose has to be run across a road or vehicle route during an incident or drill, driving over the unprotected hose can crimp it and cut water flow at the worst possible moment. This rubber ramp channels the hose beneath a driveable surface, sized to the hose diameter in use.

images.alt: Fire Hose Ramp supplied by Expert Safety Solutions, Vadodara

specs.label: Use case
specs.value: Protecting deployed fire hose from vehicle crossing
